metadata.name: Conduct Internal Check for Regulatory Audit

description: In preparation for an upcoming EPA audit, an EHS specialist needs to verify that all required emissions reports for the last year have been filed.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all required EPA air emissions reports for the facility for the previous calendar year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a list of 4 quarterly reports and 1 annual report.

nodes.task_description: For each required report, check the document management system for a record of its submission.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies that all 5 reports have a 'Submitted' status and a corresponding submission date.

nodes.task_description: Compile a summary report confirming compliance to be used as documentation for the audit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a summary document listing each report and its submission confirmation.
